cards.name: bié/ㄅㄧㄝˊ
definitions: (dialect) to turn away; to turn aside; to avert (one's face, gaze etc)

cards.name: bài/ㄅㄞˋ
definitions: to bow to; to pay one's respects
(bound form) to extend greetings (on a specific occasion)
(bound form) (of a monarch) to appoint sb to (a position) by performing a ceremony

cards.name: bā/ㄅㄚ
definitions: Ba, a state during the Zhou dynasty (in present-day Chongqing and the eastern part of Sichuan)
the east of Sichuan and Chongqing Municipality
(bound form) abbr. for _勒斯坦[Bā lè sī tǎn] (Palestine), _基斯坦[Bā jī sī tǎn] (Pakistan) or _西[Bā xī] (Brazil)

cards.name: bīng/ㄅㄧㄥ
definitions: (of an object or substance) to feel cold

cards.name: bǐ/ㄅㄧˇ
definitions: (followed by a noun and adjective) more {adj.} than {noun}

cards.name: chuáng/ㄔㄨㄤˊ
definitions: bed; couch (furniture that one can lie down on) (CL:張|张[zhāng])
bed; bottom (of rivers, oceans, gardens etc)

cards.name: chū/ㄔㄨ
definitions: to go out; to come out

cards.name: dìng/ㄉㄧㄥˋ
definitions: to fix; to set; to make definite
to subscribe to (a newspaper etc); to book (tickets etc); to order (goods etc)

cards.name: dú/ㄉㄨˊ
definitions: to read out; to read aloud
to attend (school); to study (a subject in school)

cards.name: fù/ㄈㄨˋ
definitions: to be close to; to be attached

cards.name: fú/ㄈㄨˊ
definitions: to serve (in the military, a prison sentence etc)

cards.name: fēi/ㄈㄟ
definitions: (used in loanwords for its phonetic value)

cards.name: guān/ㄍㄨㄢ
definitions: to close; to shut; to turn off
to confine; to lock (sb) up; to shut (sb in a room, a bird in a cage etc)

cards.name: gào/ㄍㄠˋ
definitions: to file a lawsuit; to sue

cards.name: huà/ㄏㄨㄚˋ
definitions: to draw (a line) (variant of the character meaning: to cut, to slash, to scratch (cut into the surface of sth), to strike (a match))
stroke of a Chinese character (variant of the character meaning: to cut, to slash, to scratch (cut into the surface of sth), to strike (a match))

cards.name: huì/ㄏㄨㄟˋ
definitions: can; to have the skill; to know how to
to be likely to; to be sure to

cards.name: hào/ㄏㄠˋ
definitions: (bound form) signal; bugle call (e.g. 起床_|起床_[qǐ chuáng hào])

cards.name: hé/ㄏㄜˊ
definitions: (joining two nouns) and; together with; with (Taiwan pr. [hàn])

cards.name: jiǎo/ㄐㄧㄠˇ
definitions: leg (of an animal or an object)

cards.name: jǐ/ㄐㄧˇ
definitions: sixth of the ten Heavenly Stems 十天干[shí tiān gān]

cards.name: kè/ㄎㄜˋ
definitions: (Tw) abbr. for _羅埃西亞|_罗埃西亚[Kè luó āi xī yà], Croatia

cards.name: mào/ㄇㄠˋ
definitions: to emit; to give off; to send out (or up, forth)
to falsely adopt (sb's identity etc); to feign

cards.name: mén/ㄇㄣˊ
definitions: valve; switch; other door-like or gate-like structure
way to do sth; knack; method; approach

cards.name: mǎ/ㄇㄚˇ
definitions: horse or cavalry piece in Chinese chess

cards.name: niàn/ㄋㄧㄢˋ
definitions: variant of the character meaning: to read, to study (a subject), to attend (a school), to read aloud, to read aloud

cards.name: nán/ㄋㄢˊ
definitions: baron, the lowest of the five ranks of nobility 五等爵位[wǔ děng jué wèi]

cards.name: páng/ㄆㄤˊ
definitions: lateral component of a Chinese character (such as 刂[dāo], 亻[rén] etc)

cards.name: qì/ㄑㄧˋ
definitions: to make angry; to annoy; to get angry

cards.name: shān/ㄕㄢ
definitions: (coll.) small bundle of straw for silkworms to spin cocoons on

cards.name: shǒu/ㄕㄡˇ
definitions: person engaged in certain types of work
person skilled in certain types of work

cards.name: suǒ/ㄙㄨㄛˇ
definitions: particle introducing a relative clause or passive

cards.name: tāng/ㄊㄤ
definitions: water in which sth has been boiled

cards.name: wù/ㄨˋ
definitions: (literary) the outside world as distinct from oneself; people other than oneself

cards.name: xiān/ㄒㄧㄢ
definitions: for the time being; for now
(prefix) my late (in referring to deceased relatives older than oneself)

cards.name: xiē/ㄒㄧㄝ
definitions: classifier indicating a small amount or small number greater than 1: some, a few, several

cards.name: xiū/ㄒㄧㄡ
definitions: to stop doing sth for a period of time

cards.name: yào/ㄧㄠˋ
definitions: substance used for a specific purpose (e.g. poisoning, explosion, fermenting)

cards.name: yào/ㄧㄠˋ
definitions: to want; to need; to ask for

cards.name: yì/ㄧˋ
definitions: (bound form) intention; feeling; inclination; state of mind
(bound form) Italy (abbr. for _大利[Yì dà lì])

cards.name: yòng/ㄩㄥˋ
definitions: to use; to make use of; to employ
to need; to have to (usu. used in the negative or in questions)

cards.name: yòu/ㄧㄡˋ
definitions: (literary) the right side as the side of precedence

cards.name: yú/ㄩˊ
definitions: used in the names of various aquatic animals that are not fish (including abalone 鮑_|鲍_[bào yú], alligators and crocodiles 鱷_|鳄_[è yú] and octopi 章_|章_[zhāng yú])

cards.name: yǎn/ㄧㄢˇ
definitions: (often used with 一[yī]) a look; a glance

cards.name: zhe/˙ㄓㄜ
definitions: aspect particle indicating action in progress or ongoing state

cards.name: zhōng/ㄓㄨㄥ
definitions: amount of time; o'clock (CL:點|点[diǎn],分[fēn],秒[miǎo]) (as in 三點_|三点_[sān diǎn zhōng] "three o'clock" or "three hours" or 五分_|五分_[wǔ fēn zhōng] "five minutes" etc)

cards.name: zuì/ㄗㄨㄟˋ
definitions: (before an adjective or verb) to the highest degree; (the) most ...; -est
(after 之[zhī]) best or most extreme example (e.g. 世界之_[shì jiè zhī zuì] "the greatest in the world")

cards.name: zuò/ㄗㄨㄛˋ
definitions: to regard as; to consider to be

cards.name: zì/ㄗˋ
definitions: naturally; as a matter of course

cards.name: ài/ㄞˋ
definitions: to love; to be fond of; to like
to be inclined (to do sth); to tend to (happen)

phrases.name: gǎnmào/ㄍㄢˇ ㄇㄠˋ
definitions: (coll.) to be interested in (often used in the negative)

phrases.name: jièshào/ㄐㄧㄝˋ ㄕㄠˋ
definitions: to present (sb for a job etc)

phrases.name: xiàkè/ㄒㄧㄚˋ ㄎㄜˋ
definitions: (fig.) (esp. of a sports coach) to be dismissed
